args.query: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY 1;

args.query: SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS n_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", COUNT(*) AS n_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Date" >= '2018-01-01' AND "Date" < '2019-01-01' AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
